title: Prospero cyrenaicum
intro: Prospero cyrenaicum, also known as Cyrenaic Prospero, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The bioactive constituents of Prospero cyrenaicum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, infusions, and capsules, often used to treat respiratory issues, as well as to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress.
